title: OUTPATIENT THERAPY - 211info
text: FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND OUTPATIENT THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient individual and family mental health therapy. 1836 Fremont Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 5 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 414-1720 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 414-1720 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Family Counseling Individual Counseling Individual Counseling * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PROCTOR FOSTER CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
